_comment: Illustrative shape of the detections.ai BFF /bff/api/v1/intel payload. Field names are normalized tolerantly by run.py (_normalize_one). Used for offline import and `runner.py --selftest --connector detections-ai`.

items.title: EDRChoker Bypasses EDR Telemetry via QoS Throttling
items.summary: The EDRChoker tool weaponizes Windows Policy-based Quality of Service (QoS) to throttle EDR process bandwidth to 8 bits per second, starving sensors of telemetry while attacker activity proceeds.

techniques.name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools

items.title: DPRK-linked Ironchain Backdoor Targets Supply Chains
items.description: A Lazarus-linked cluster deploys the Ironchain backdoor through a poisoned build dependency, exploiting CVE-2026-41089 for initial access and using scheduled tasks for persistence.
items.author: threatlabs
